overall.description: Nighttime rainy urban street scene from GTA V, showing vehicles driving past on a wet multi-lane road. The stationary camera captures traffic flow as the signal changes from green to red, with neon store signs and palm trees visible in the background.

illuminated blue store sign for Binco clothing store on building facade
overhead traffic signal showing green light
palm trees silhouetted against the dark rainy sky
rain-soaked asphalt with reflections of street lights and vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy night in the city, with the camera positioned on the roadside. A white pickup truck drives past on the wet asphalt while the traffic light remains green. The Binco store sign is visible in the distance on the left, and a concrete wall runs along the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet multi-lane urban street with retail buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe traffic from the stationary roadside position

notable_agents.action: red pickup truck driving past followed closely by a gold SUV

segments.scene_description: The concrete wall exits the frame as a red pickup truck passes by, followed by additional vehicles. The Binco store sign becomes more prominent on the left as the camera's view shifts slightly, with the traffic light still showing green in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet multi-lane urban street approaching intersection

events.description: traffic light changes from green to yellow
traffic light changes from yellow to red, vehicles begin slowing

agents.ego_description: stationary at the roadside observing the traffic signal change

notable_agents.action: gold SUV slowing down as it approaches the red light at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The traffic light transitions from green to yellow and then to red. Vehicles including a gold SUV slow down as they approach the intersection. The rain continues to fall on the wet pavement, reflecting the changing light signals.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet multi-lane urban street at red light

agents.ego_description: waiting at the roadside while traffic is stopped at the red signal

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopped at the red light waiting to proceed

segments.scene_description: With the traffic light now red, vehicles have come to a stop at the intersection. A black sedan waits on the left side of the frame while the rain continues to fall. The Binco store sign appears slightly further in the distance as the scene remains relatively static.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a rainy urban intersection as the flow of nighttime traffic transitions from steady movement to a complete standstill. It begins on the roadside with a white pickup truck passing over wet asphalt while a green traffic light allows vehicles to stream past a distant Binco store sign. As the camera's view shifts slightly, a red pickup truck and other cars follow, causing the adjacent concrete wall to slide out of frame. The scene then shifts as the traffic light cycles from green to yellow and finally red, prompting a gold SUV and other vehicles to slow down against the reflective, rain-slicked pavement. Finally, the movement ceases entirely as a black sedan and other cars come to a halt at the intersection under the persistent rainfall.
